title: MAX_SYNC_LAG doc implies operator configurability that does not exist
description: The doc comment on MAX_SYNC_LAG says 'Operators who want a tighter bound (e.g. for high-frequency merchants) can lower this'. But MAX_SYNC_LAG is a hardcoded pub const — there is no CLI flag, config key, or env var that changes it. The comment creates an expectation that will generate issue reports ('how do I configure the sync lag?'). Fix: either add a configuration path (env var ZCASH_MAX_SYNC_LAG?) or remove the 'operators can lower this' sentence and replace with a plain rationale for the 10-block value.
